combat_pillars.melee: stable frontline damage and basic weapon mastery
combat_pillars.ranged: safer damage with positioning advantage and lower sustained throughput
combat_pillars.magic: broad utility and burst controlled by MP, books, and spell level
combat_pillars.defense: armor, shield, injury mitigation, and attrition resistance
combat_pillars.agility: evasion, detection control, ambush power, and mobility
